CustomField.description: Defines how the rate of pay/charge will be determined for Allowances when creating Assignment Rates" Award-Based Rate: The rate will be calculated based on the employee's Award Classification and Award Level. Fixed Rate: A flat rate will be applied, regardless of the employee's classification or level.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Defines how the rate of pay/charge will be determined for Allowances when creating Assignment Rates" Award-Based Rate: The rate will be calculated based on the employee's Award Classification and Award Level. Fixed Rate: A flat rate will be applied, regardless of the employee's classification or level.
CustomField.label: Rate Selection Type
